responsibilities: developing full-stack features for the moberg clinical platform, including eeg review workflows, ui overhauls, and backend processing changes for neurocritical care teams
designing and implementing real-time signal processing pipelines for qEEG metric computation and visualization inside the clinical monitoring interface
leading development of an ai-powered copilot across the clinical platform and a jupyterhub-based analytics studio for natural-language analysis of neuromonitoring data
leading r&d for artifact detection and removal models for arterial blood pressure and electrocardiogram waveforms in high-resolution neuromonitoring datasets
leading development of the autonomous communications medical ecosystem (acme), a dod-funded multimodal sensor platform for combat casualty care
building internal developer tooling and workflow automations that integrate ai agents into the software development lifecycle
contributing to regulatory documentation and fda 510(k) submission processes
enhanced spatial transcriptomics analysis by introducing software and machine learning workflows for quality control, visualization, annotation, and gene expression quantification
collaborated with the hesi estar carcinogenicity working group to build a neural network for predicting molecular initiating events linked to liver carcinogenicity
used umap and t-sne on a large chembl dataset to cluster hesi compounds and develop biomarker models within each cluster
spearheaded development of an interactive analytics and visualization platform for geomx spatial transcriptomics data
developed an interactive web app for statistical analysis and biomarker discovery on high-content imaging datasets using dash, flask, dask, and rstudio connect
implemented decision trees, random forests, and svm models for biomarker discovery in high-content imaging datasets
implemented noise2void and cellpose to improve cellprofiler image segmentation and feature extraction pipelines
led analytical work resulting in four peer-reviewed publications on immune response, urinary biomarkers, and neurological impacts in covid-19 patients
analyzed temporal changes in serum markers tied to organ failure and anti-viral treatments in covid-19 cohorts
developed python and r scripts to automate ingestion, quality control, and analysis of elisa and next generation sequencing datasets

workExperience.company: zhou lab, children's hospital of philadelphia
responsibilities: contributed to the sesame package for analysis of infinium DNA methylation datasets
developed tests that validated package functionality against publicly available geo datasets
